titles.title: PHS ACCESS Act
Public Health Services for Advancing Care and Creating Efficient Support Systems in Underserved Communities Act
PHS ACCESS Act
A bill to establish procedures for the detailing of Public Health Service Officers for purposes of advancing care in underserved communities.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
